typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveFile as string (),
	ArchiveFolder as string (),
	DestinationFile as string (),
	FileNameWithoutPath as string (),
	HasErrored as boolean (),
	ImportFileId as integer (),
	ImportRunId as integer (),
	IsFileNameValid as boolean (),
	OriginalFile as string (),
	OutputFile as string (),
	ProcessingFile as string (),
	ProcessingFolder as string (),
	ReceptionFolder as string (),
	ValuationDate as timestamp (),
	Cfg_BaseDirectory as string (),
	Cfg_DateFormat as string (),
	Cfg_DatePattern as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Column 0} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive({Column 0} = {Column 0}) ~> PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator
FlatFileSource derive() ~> FlatFileSourceErrorReformat
PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator derive({Plan id} = SchemeName,
		MV = Amount,
		{Fund id} = GroupName) ~> Remapcolumns
PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator derive(ErrorCode = ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn = ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription = ErrorDescription,
		RowNo = RowNo,
		{} = {}) ~> FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat
FlatFileSourceErrorReformat derive(ImportRunId = $User__ImportRunId,
		ErrorLevel = 10102,
		ImportFileId = $User__ImportRunId,
		Message = left('Unable to read data : ' + toString(Flat_File_Source_Error_Output_Column), 255)) ~> Error10102
FlatFileSourceErrorReformat derive() ~> FlatFileSource0
Remapcolumns sink(input(
		Plan_id as string,
		MV as string,
		Fund_id as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Plan_id = {Plan id},
		MV,
		Fund_id = {Fund id})) ~> FlatFileDestination
FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat derive(ImportRunId = $User__ImportRunId,
		ErrorLevel = 10101,
		ImportFileId = $User__ImportRunId) ~> Error10101
FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat derive(ErrorCode = ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn = ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription = ErrorDescription,
		RowNo = RowNo,
		{} = {}) ~> FlatFileValidator0
Error10102 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10102
FlatFileSource0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> FlatFileSourceERROROUTPUTFILE
Error10101 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber = RowNo,
		ImportRunId,
		Message = ErrorDescription,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10101
FlatFileValidator0 sink(input(
		ErrorCode as integer,
		ErrorColumn as integer,
		ErrorDescription as string,
		RowNo as integer,
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription,
		RowNo,
		{})) ~> FlatFileValidatorERROROUTPUTFILE
